nasb.text: And turning His gaze toward His disciples, He began to say, “Blessed are you who are poor, for yours is the kingdom of God.

esv.text: And he lifted up his eyes on his disciples, and said: “Blessed are you who are poor, for     yours is the kingdom of God.

cnv.text: 耶穌抬頭看著門徒，說： “貧窮的人有福了， 因為　神的國是你們的。

ccb.text: 耶稣抬头望着门徒，对他们说： “贫穷的人有福了， 因为上帝的国属于你们！

csbs.text: 耶稣举目看着他的门徒们，说： “贫乏的人是蒙福的， 因为神的国是你们的。
